notes:
Game requires a rename to the "Movies" folder as well as changing some file permissions to achive proper functionality. See issue on GitHub for more information.
Game stutters a lot while it generates the shader cache. Play some "Local Versus" matches against bots until it subsides.
Requires Proton 3.16-5 or newer or audio will be troublesome.
Losing focus of the game window can sometimes cause mouse clicks to fail on certain UI elements. Tab out and back in to fix.
title: Hyper Jam
